identity.title: Adversarially re-evaluate and remediate the Phase 0 executable-gate bootstrap

authorization.reference: Operator requested evaluation tests on WP-FF-003 through different adversarial lenses, remediation of findings, gaps, concerns, and risks, code cleanup where needed, and explicitly authorized sub-agent assistance.

lifecycle.next_action: Commit and remotely back up the refreshed merge-pending evidence, merge the accepted closure into main, then mechanically verify containment before VALIDATED.

scope.summary: Re-evaluate the validated WP-FF-003 implementation through independent contract, hostile-state, and Rust-quality lenses; remediate confirmed defects and regression-proof them without widening Phase 0 scope.
in_scope: Re-prove every WP-FF-003 v1 acceptance requirement against current main
Attack false-PASS routes, policy/schema boundaries, failure propagation, hostile repository/environment states, and Rust implementation quality
Add focused regression tests or fixtures for confirmed gaps
Remove or simplify brittle, duplicated, misleading, or unnecessary code only when full scope remains proven
Run final architecture-check and verify-pr gates plus independent counterfactual, boundary, and negative-path probes
non_goals: Shipped Ferric Forager product features or crates
Broad implementation-readiness, parity, performance, durability, or cross-platform claims
Changing the accepted three-root architecture or authority precedence
dependencies: WP-FF-003 v1 validated implementation and acceptance contract
Pinned Rust toolchain, Cargo, rustfmt, Clippy, cargo-deny, and Git
No new product runtime or native dependency

acceptance_matrix.requirement: All eight WP-FF-003 v1 acceptance requirements remain preserved and are freshly re-proven against current source, policy, reports, fixtures, manual, and canonical commands.
evidence: All preserved v1 source, policy, fixture, report, manual, and canonical command surfaces passed from clean commit 27887cea0026a9db218b623ce8e69fc0cf191fb0.

acceptance_matrix.requirement: Independent contract/policy, hostile-state, and Rust-quality audits each derive concrete attack surfaces and run checks beyond the v1 evidence list, including at least two counterfactuals, one producer-consumer boundary probe, and one negative-path probe overall; every material result is reproduced by the primary agent.
evidence: Independent contract/policy, hostile-state, and Rust-quality audits recorded nine confirmed findings.

Primary reproduction covered CRLF manifests, malformed YAML, noncanonical split triggers, nested selectors, feature drift, unsupported hosts, timeouts, dynamic packet inputs, and production-fixture reachability.
Counterfactuals, producer-consumer input binding, and degraded negative paths are executable in the 19-test suite.

acceptance_matrix.requirement: Every confirmed finding, gap, concern, and risk is either remediated with executable regression proof or retained as explicit residual uncertainty that does not contradict Phase 0 PASS; no false-PASS route remains known.
evidence: Every confirmed finding is listed under extensions.change_evidence.independent_findings with a remediation.
All retained uncertainty is bounded under extensions.change_evidence.residual_uncertainty and does not contradict the stated Phase 0 proof ceiling.
The clean-source verify-pr report contains zero failed checks and 16 production-validator fixture results.

acceptance_matrix.requirement: A reuse, deletion, dependency, and simplification review removes or improves brittle or unnecessary implementation where safe, and the full accepted scope/risk matrix passes again after cleanup.
evidence: SyntheticScenario and SyntheticEdge were deleted in favor of production validator reuse.
Process orchestration, dependency checks, TOML/YAML parsing, and repository mutation helpers were centralized and warnings-denied Clippy passed.
Exact non-shipped saphyr and sha2 decisions, transitive build inventory, and Zlib license policy passed cargo-deny.

acceptance_matrix.requirement: The pinned architecture-check and verify-pr commands, formatting, warnings-denied Clippy, tests, docs, dependency policy, governance parsing, authority mirror, allowlist, registry-target, and git diff checks pass on the final branch with truthful proof limitations.
evidence: Final aggregate source was clean at 27887cea0026a9db218b623ce8e69fc0cf191fb0; 28 checks, 19 tests, 16 fixtures, cargo-deny, advisory freshness, docs, governance parsing, authority mirror, and git diff checks passed.

checks_run: FF-GATE-ARCH-001 PASS with clean source at 27887cea0026a9db218b623ce8e69fc0cf191fb0
FF-GATE-PR-001 PASS with clean source at 27887cea0026a9db218b623ce8e69fc0cf191fb0
19 focused tests PASS; 13 composed repository mutation cases and 16 production-validator fixture rows PASS
Governance JSON/YAML parse, authority mirror, and git diff --check PASS
last_checkpoint.next_action: Commit merge-pending evidence and durable reports, push remote backup, merge to main, and verify closure containment.

checks: Clean-source report proof: git commit 27887cea0026a9db218b623ce8e69fc0cf191fb0, dirty=false, 28 checks, zero failures, 16 production-validator fixtures
cargo fmt, three locked check profiles, warnings-denied Clippy, 19 tests, rustdoc warnings denied, cargo-deny advisories/bans/licenses/sources: PASS
Governance JSON/YAML parsing, authority mirror equality, active v2 packet/refinement report inputs, allowlisted changed paths, registry targets, and git diff --check: PASS
not_proven: Shipped clean-artifact behavior before a shipped member exists
Cross-platform behavior not exercised on this Windows host
Descendant process-tree cancellation beyond the directly spawned child
Dynamic runtime path construction beyond conservative lexical scanning

changed_requirements: Primary-agent reproduction and remediation of confirmed findings
Post-remediation cleanup and full proof rerun

required_outcomes: Make every aggregate PASS fail closed
Keep product runtime independent from .GOV and build
Keep reports collision-safe, atomic, attributable, and truthful
Keep command failures and unavailable gates from becoming PASS
risk_cases: Validator trusts self-declared policy instead of independent inputs
Malformed, unknown, missing, or mismatched data is ignored
Fixture fails for the wrong reason
Hostile repository, path, Git, or tool state produces a false PASS
Report creation or command error is swallowed
Brittle parsing or duplicated logic diverges across gates

review_gates.scope_and_risk_coverage: PASS: three independent lenses and primary-agent reproductions covered contracts, hostile state, process failure, parser failure, dependency drift, portability, and code quality.
review_gates.reuse_deletion_dependency_simplification: PASS: removed the duplicated SyntheticScenario validator, reused production primitives, centralized bounded process execution, and selected only two exact non-shipped pure-Rust dependencies for missing capabilities.
review_gates.post_simplification_complete_rerun: PASS: formatting, warnings-denied Clippy, 19 focused tests, and architecture-check were green after the production-validator and checksum cleanup; verify-pr is the final aggregate proof.

reuse_candidates_in_order_with_result.candidate: no mechanism beyond the accepted outcome
reuse_candidates_in_order_with_result.result: rejected because confirmed false-PASS routes required executable remediation and regression proof
selected for production validator primitives, report protocol, Cargo metadata graph, policy schemas, fixture inventory, and canonical gate orchestration
selected for bounded child supervision, atomic capture cleanup, recursive selector inventory, path containment, deterministic collections, and file streaming
selected direct Cargo, rustup component, Git, where.exe, filesystem, and process APIs without shell composition or foreground windows
existing serde, serde_json, toml, and cargo_metadata were retained; current research selected exact saphyr and sha2 versions for missing YAML and checksum capabilities
selected one private xtask with strict policy schemas, production-linked fixtures, representative repository sandboxes, and one bounded process layer; no shipped crate or public API was introduced

artifact_specific_justification.cargo_workspace: Exact non-shipped parser and checksum dependencies must be reproducibly locked and linted.
artifact_specific_justification.xtask: Confirmed false-PASS and hang routes were in the executable validator and required direct remediation.
artifact_specific_justification.architecture_policy: Dependency ownership, features, consumers, reasons, removal triggers, approval IDs, and member safety references must fail closed.
artifact_specific_justification.tooling_policy: Exact commands, sources, hosts, versions, provenance kinds, and host executable checksums require canonical declarations.
artifact_specific_justification.rule_to_proof: The preserved rule map remains the canonical rule, validator, and fixture inventory contract.
artifact_specific_justification.negative_fixtures: All assigned negative rows now invoke production validator primitives and representative mutations exercise the composed gate.
artifact_specific_justification.model_manual: No-context operators need the new timeout, YAML, checksum, and recovery behavior documented.

change_evidence.pre_simplification_verdict: PASS: every confirmed audit finding had a reproducible failure path; the remediation scope was necessary, but duplicated synthetic validation and repeated unbounded process handling were not acceptable maintenance surfaces.
simplification_changes: Removed SyntheticScenario, SyntheticEdge, and their parallel validator implementation; fixture rows now call production validator primitives.
Centralized every child invocation through bounded status or output helpers with quiet Windows execution, capture cleanup, kill, and reap behavior.
Replaced exact-text CRLF-sensitive manifest checks and YAML line scans with semantic TOML and maintained YAML parsing.
Split dependency validation into decision, direct, and transitive helpers to keep warnings-denied Clippy green and make policy boundaries auditable.
Added only the OSI-approved Zlib license used by Saphyr's locked foldhash transitive dependency after cargo-deny rejected the first aggregate run.
change_evidence.post_simplification_verdict: PASS: the smaller validation model preserves all 16 assigned diagnostics, 13 composed repository mutations, exact policy checks, and truthful timeout behavior; 19 focused tests and architecture-check pass after cleanup.
complete_post_change_verification: cargo clippy --manifest-path build/Cargo.toml --workspace --all-targets --all-features --locked --target-dir build/target -- -D warnings: PASS
cargo test --manifest-path build/Cargo.toml --workspace --all-targets --all-features --locked --no-fail-fast --target-dir build/target -- --test-threads=1: PASS, 19 tests
cargo run --manifest-path build/Cargo.toml --locked -p fforager-xtask -- architecture-check: PASS, 12 canonical architecture rules and 16 production-validator fixture rows
Representative repository mutation matrix: PASS, 13 baseline-positive then exact-negative composed gate probes
Bounded process timeout negative path: PASS with explicit incomplete-evidence result after child kill and reap
Malformed governance YAML and noncanonical task state: PASS by rejection before value consumption
Nested toolchain selector, dependency feature drift, unsupported host, and invalid split trigger: PASS by exact diagnostic rejection

ceilings_exceptions_and_evidence.current_ceiling: Phase 0 has one non-shipped xtask on the supported x86_64 Windows MSVC host; no shipped member, watcher, deep gate, release gate, or cross-platform process proof exists.
ceilings_exceptions_and_evidence.replacement_trigger: A shipped member, watcher package, supported-host expansion, deep-risk claim, or release claim activates the owning future gate and proof corpus.
ceilings_exceptions_and_evidence.likely_upgrade_path: Extend the same strict policy and versioned report protocol with platform-specific descendant process supervision and runtime or packaging fixtures owned by the activating packet.
ceilings_exceptions_and_evidence.trigger_detection_method: Workspace member policy, product watcher manifest, supported_hosts, active packet risks, and gate inventory are inspected fail closed.

independent_findings: REMEDIATED HIGH: CRLF member manifests bypassed exact-text lint inheritance checks; semantic TOML parsing now covers LF, CRLF, spacing, ordering, false, and malformed inputs.
REMEDIATED HIGH: arbitrary split-trigger text passed; only FF-BUILD-036 is accepted.
REMEDIATED HIGH: fixed selector paths missed nested selectors; recursive governed-root inventory now detects them while excluding generated build/target.
REMEDIATED HIGH: fixture validation duplicated production logic; the duplicate engine was removed and composed repository mutations regression-proof production reachability.
REMEDIATED HIGH: architecture and dependency policy omitted ownership, consumer, feature, default-feature, safety, exception, and removal metadata; strict schema v2 now enforces each field.
REMEDIATED HIGH: external commands were unbounded; all command paths now use explicit deadlines and incomplete-evidence timeout errors.
REMEDIATED MEDIUM: report inputs hardcoded the v1 packet; active packet and refinement inputs are now resolved and contained dynamically.
REMEDIATED MEDIUM: tool policy trusted loose declarations; schema v3 enforces exact identity, command, source, supported host, provenance, and Git/cargo-deny executable SHA-256.
REMEDIATED HIGH: line-scanned YAML could fail open on malformed authority; saphyr parses one YAML document structurally before governed values are read.
REMEDIATED DEPENDENCY GATE: the first aggregate run rejected foldhash's Zlib license; the exact OSI-approved license is now explicitly inventoried in cargo-deny policy.
residual_uncertainty: Windows child timeout proof kills and reaps the directly spawned process; a future gate that spawns descendant process trees must add Job Object supervision before claiming tree-wide cancellation.
Product runtime path protection includes conservative lexical source scanning; dynamically constructed paths remain outside Phase 0 proof and are stated in the architecture report limitations.

Graph edge fixture rows execute production classifiers and cycle detection, but Cargo rejects some cyclic manifests before metadata exists; composed repository mutations cover all policy, source, host, path, and dependency surfaces that can reach the gate through valid Cargo metadata.
